event: Still life arrangement of kitchen utensils and foodstuffs
description: A simple yet masterful still life depicting kitchen objects arranged on a stone ledge. A large copper cauldron tilts on its side at center, revealing its interior. A dark ceramic pitcher stands to the right. At left, a small wooden mortar or vessel sits beside two white eggs on the ledge. A piece of salmon or fish rests on a plate in front of the copper pot. What appears to be a dried fish or meat hangs on the wall behind. The muted palette of browns, copper tones, and dark greens creates an atmosphere of quiet domesticity. The artist's signature 'Chardin' is visible at the lower left.
